_confidence_notes: PDF-verified against .omo/work/gin7manual/gin7manual.pdf (manual page P = PDF page P+1). CJK glyphs are CID-encoded with no ToUnicode map so Japanese text did not extract, but the numeric tokens did and confirm the digest values.
Confirmed numerics on the page: peerage '5' label, address-book cap 100, mailbox in/out caps 120/120, XP threshold sequence '100 / 100→+1 / reset 0' for the experience mechanic.
Peerage (爵位) has a count/list mismatch IN THE SOURCE: manual text says '5 kinds' but enumerates six entries. Preserved verbatim and flagged _uncertain.

Character growth (§2.3) is explicitly a provisional spec (現在暫定的な仕様). Exact age cutoffs, per-month probabilities, ability caps/floors, and the per-command CP-type table are NOT printed in the manual; flagged _uncertain where present.

8 ability stats map to the 0x0323 character record (ability_8 block @0x188 per docs/logh7-info-records-wire.md). Per-ability numeric ranges (e.g. 0-100) are NOT given on these pages; only PCP/MCP family grouping is canonical here.

descriptive_fields.notes: Created characters choose freely; global name uniqueness is enforced.
Purely cosmetic — no post-creation ability difference between male/female.
Stored once at creation; displayed in 帝国歴 (Empire calendar) or 宇宙歴 (Alliance/Universal calendar) depending on faction.
Ladder from 二等兵 (Private 2nd Class) up to 元帥 (Marshal). See peerage table for the Empire-only nobility axis.

descriptive_fields.uncertain_reason: Manual text says '5 kinds' but the enumeration lists six entries (the sixth, 帝国騎士 Imperial Knight, may be a distinct standing rather than a peerage). Count/list mismatch is in the source.

listed.note: Possibly a distinct standing, not a peerage proper.

descriptive_fields.notes: Default respawn location; if the birthplace is sunk/lost, no return point is set.

progression_fields.notes: Tracked per-current-rank. Promotion/demotion is decided by RELATIVE ranking among same-rank peers, not an absolute threshold.

abilities._note: Eight ability stats, split into the PCP family (政治指令 / strategic-command, planet-side) and the MCP family (軍事指令 / military-command, fleet-side). Numeric ranges per stat are not given on these pages. Maps to the ability_8 block of the 0x0323 record.

PCP.effect: Affects spy activity (スパイ活動) and tactical detection ability (索敵能力) (p15).

MCP.effect: Higher → subordinate ships respond/redeploy more quickly; governs command-range-circle regrowth (p15, p48).
Higher → more agile ship-handling (操艦); governs Reverse-command speed (p15, p53).
As commander/staff → fleet attack power; as defense commander → planet anti-ship (対艦) defense (p15).
As commander/staff → fleet defense; as defense commander → planet anti-occupation defense (p15).

growth_mechanics._provisional_note: 現在暫定的な仕様 — manual states this is a provisional spec.

age_effect.description: Each month, young characters (若年) have a chance of a POSITIVE ability change; mature characters (壮年) have a chance of a NEGATIVE change. Both bounded by a fixed cap/floor.
age_effect.uncertain_reason: Exact age cutoffs, monthly probabilities, and the ability cap/floor values are not printed on the manual pages.

experience_via_cp.description: Each strategic command spends CP. CP used is accumulated; per fixed quantum of accumulated CP, +1 XP is granted to one ability (gated by whether the command is PCP-type or MCP-type). At 100 XP an ability rises +1 and XP resets to 0.
experience_via_cp.substitution_note: CP consumed via substitution (代用) is NOT counted toward XP.
experience_via_cp.uncertain_reason: The per-command CP-type (PCP vs MCP) mapping table and the fixed CP-per-XP quantum are not printed on these pages; only the PCP/MCP family grouping is canonical.

address_book.note: Stores personal mail addresses; exchanged via [名刺交換] (business-card exchange).

rules: Only 1 outstanding call (calling state) at a time.
A new call cancels the prior outstanding call.
Calling while connected drops the existing connection.
Accepting one incoming call auto-cancels all other incoming calls.

chat.default_audience: Same スポット (spot) zone — home (自宅), conference room (会議室), tavern (酒場).
chat.same_unit_rule: Same-部隊 (unit) members can chat across spots if they are in the same grid.
chat.tactical_mode_rule: In tactical mode only, chat broadcasts to all friendly (自陣営) characters in the same grid.

commands.effect: Pushes the player's personal mail address to the partner (adds to their address book).

commands.ja: キャラクター情報取得
commands.maps_note: Maps to a 0x0323-style character record view.
